faq.title: Answers to Your Questions
faq.description: Most popular questions about our solutions and services

questions.question: What are the timeframes for greenhouse project implementation?
questions.answer: Timeframes depend on project scale: for small farm greenhouses (up to 1 Ha) — 2-3 months, for industrial complexes (5-15 Ha) — 4-8 months. This includes design, equipment delivery, installation and commissioning.

questions.question: Do you provide equipment warranty?
questions.answer: Yes, we provide warranty on all equipment from 12 to 36 months depending on type. Post-warranty service, spare parts supply and 24/7 tech support are also available.

questions.question: Can you modernize existing greenhouses?
questions.answer: Absolutely! We conduct audits of existing facilities and offer modernization solutions: automation systems installation, covering replacement, drip irrigation implementation, energy-saving screens and other equipment.

questions.question: What is the ROI for greenhouse complex investment?
questions.answer: ROI depends on crop, technology and market. On average, industrial complexes pay back in 2-4 years, farm greenhouses — in 1.5-3 years. We develop detailed business plans with ROI calculations for each project.

questions.question: Do you train staff to operate equipment?
questions.answer: Yes, staff training is included in facility launch services. We conduct theoretical and practical sessions for agronomists, engineers and operators. Technical documentation in Russian is also provided.

questions.question: Do you work throughout the CIS?
questions.answer: Yes, we have offices in Russia, Belarus and partners in Kazakhstan. We've completed projects in 12 CIS countries and provide local support in all regions of presence.
